adoption_plan.boundary: Vendorized. FREE AI lives inside vendor/free-ai. It is fully isolated from the Python backend but resides in the same repository.
adoption_plan.orchestration: GS FOOD uses PM2 or a unified startup script to run both the Python backend and the free-ai Node.js server.
adoption_plan.future_updates: Any updates to the engine structure must respect the boundary and not leak into the GS FOOD UI or Python core directly.
